name: Routh Street Restaurant B-b-q Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, halved and seeded
1 Small dried ancho chile pepper, halved and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Smoke all vegetables and chiles for 20 minutes.
2. Transfer the ingredients to a medium saucepan with the stock. Bring to a boil and reduce the liquid by at least one third.
3. Whisk in the mustard, strain, and set aside.
4. In a small saucepan, whisk together the sugar and vinegar. Bring to a boil and continue cooking until the mixture becomes syrupy, about 3 minutes.
5. Add to the strained stock and whisk in the ketchup. Strain the sauce through a fine strainer and season with salt to taste.
